SEARCH

Class DoublingListTest

java.lang.Object
DoublingListTest
public class DoublingListTest extends Object
DoublingListTest.java JUnit 4 unit tests for DoublingList. Every figure in the project specification (Figures 4–11) is tested, along with iterator operations, boundary conditions, and compaction.
Version:
4/15/26
Author:
Ali Kablanbek
